meaning: n.[pl.] 资源,财力,办法,智谋
examples: A country's principal resource is its brainpower.
When necessary, instinct is the most reliable resource you can fall back on.
The Internet is often used as a resource and as a tool for distance learning.
It is an important habitat for wading birds and a great recreational resource for Copenhageners.
The uses and benefits of ice as a resource eventually came to be known all over the world.
